title: CocoaFurbish
description: A simple, unobtrusive mod that adds a good selection of small furniture!
body:
![header](https://i.imgur.com/tmw4ZrI.png) **

**Ever wanted a simple decoration mod with no custom crafting bench or other systems? Well, Cocoafurbish has got you covered!**

** --- ![divider](https://i.imgur.com/v8NUxUH.png) ###

**Requires: [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)** ![GeckoLib](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cfe65ea9208c8bb00c4fdff654696a9a8fd6694b.png)

###

**Compatible with: [Create Aeronautics](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-aeronautics/versions)** ![Aeronautics](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2b4fa800b0c103dcdf1b25f1f9d388c5f11d5f3.png)

![divider](https://i.imgur.com/v8NUxUH.png) --- ##

CONTENTS



**Cocoafurbish** adds bits and pieces of decor and furnishing in a way that doesn't interfere with Vanilla gameplay any more than it needs to. ##

No custom crafting, no custom mechanics.





Most features of the mod were designed to be unique, and not done before by other furniture mods. This allows it to not only seamlessly merge together with said others, but also have the room to add more never before seen additions!

The mod aims to add some unique features!





### Features include:

**Incense Sticks:** Inhaling it's relaxing incense will allow you to sleep through the scariest of nights!

**Piggy Bank:** Store your gems and nuggets, and break the bank to get them back!

**Nameplate:** Display your name on your desk to show everyone who's boss! (Literally)

**Bulletin Boards:** Keep things ordered, organize your search parties, catch the interdimensional hopper Chester-.. wait what were we talking about?

**Paper Windmill:** Watch it dance with the wind... And then watch it dance harder with the storm that's about to get you. ##

All in the budget!

![divider](https://i.imgur.com/v8NUxUH.png) ![pink room](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Vs171Lzs/images/0323feb26f502f73ac1a477a52a346be4a9968b2.png) ![office](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Vs171Lzs/images/ddc39807495c62ccd6c3bc5abd3c5759d48bba57.png) ![clock_hall](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Vs171Lzs/images/8b298ee8f63384bf803c4e9216a272fdc48c33a5.png) ![pink_palace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Vs171Lzs/images/5dced7610db1fd5e3c702eb6eecfb1b50c2a7779.png) #### Gallery images might contain color-correction and/or editing, and are for displaying function and contents of the mod* ![divider](https://i.imgur.com/v8NUxUH.png) ##
